_comment: Provenance record shipped alongside each built Ziggy hub image. The build pipeline (packer/ or the golden-image job) fills the REPLACE_* fields. This committed copy is the SCHEMA + example; never hand-edit checksums.

provenance.notes: Golden base image only. Per-home identity, HA token, MQTT creds, data_key and B2 credentials are minted per hub by scripts/factory/ziggy-image-device.sh and never present in this artifact.
